about.title: Where Javanese Soul Meets World-Class Technology.
about.intro: Digiwangsa is a digital studio born from a simple belief: technology should carry meaning. We blend the depth of Javanese heritage — patience, craft, and harmony — with the precision of modern web engineering.
about.story: The name “Digiwangsa” unites the digital era with “wangsa” — a dynasty, a lineage. We build digital legacies: websites and applications meant to last, to represent, and to grow with you. Like a wayang performance, every project we craft tells a story, with care behind every detail.

values.name: Craft Over Templates
values.desc: Every project is built bespoke — designed around your identity, never copy-pasted.

values.name: Meaning & Purpose
values.desc: Beautiful is the baseline. We design for outcomes that matter to your business.

values.name: Partnership
values.desc: We work with you, not just for you — transparent, collaborative, and honest.

values.name: Lasting Quality
values.desc: Clean code and timeless design, built to perform and endure.
